title: cinchona pallescens var. ovata
intro: Cinchona pallescens var. ovata is a plant species, a variety of the Cinchona pallescens, which is a type of flowering plant native to the Andes mountains. This plant contains quinine, a naturally occurring compound with medicinal properties that help alleviate symptoms of malaria and other fevers. The health benefits of Cinchona pallescens var. ovata include its ability to act as an antimalarial and anti-inflammatory agent, reducing fever and alleviating pain and discomfort. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, extracts, and tinctures, which are often used to treat malaria and other febrile illnesses.
